//: Downstream MCP catalog for the orchestrator. Each capability is one MCP server.
//launch: command/args/workingDirectory say HOW to connect; summary/instructions tell the model WHEN to use it.
//tokens: ${SOLUTION_DIR} = repo root, ${CONFIG_DIR} = this file's folder; any other ${VAR} resolves from environment.
//override: Point MCP_ORCHESTRATOR_CONFIG at a different file to swap this catalog.

capabilities.name: jira
capabilities.summary: Issue tracking — read and search simulated JIRA tickets.
capabilities.instructions: Use for anything about tickets/issues/bugs/sprint status. Include the issue key (e.g. PROJ-123) when you know it.

capabilities.name: codegen
capabilities.summary: Code generation — scaffold a simple C# class from a short spec.
capabilities.instructions: Use to generate boilerplate. Provide a class name (and optionally a comma-separated list of fields).

capabilities.name: files
capabilities.summary: Filesystem access — list, read and search files under the repository root.
capabilities.instructions: Use to inspect real files on disk. Provide an absolute path within the allowed root. Backed by the official @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem reference server.
